description_long: This kiosk features a sleek, modern design with a sturdy black pedestal base supporting an angled interactive panel. The main interface consists of a large, slightly inclined touchscreen or tactile surface, accompanied by a prominent horizontal light bar above for illumination. A set of headphones is attached to the right side, suggesting audio interactivity, and a small orange button is visible on the front panel for user input. The kiosk's structure is primarily composed of metal and plastic, with a matte black finish and subtle text or signage on the front. The overall appearance is professional and functional, suitable for public information or multimedia use in urban environments.
description: A modern black pedestal kiosk with an angled interactive panel, overhead light bar, and attached headphones, designed for public multimedia or information use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the interactive panel, overhead light bar, attached headphones, and visible signage.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the angled panel, headphone placement, and the kiosk's slim profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid pedestal support and the back of the light bar, with minimal visible features.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the angled panel and the absence of headphones on this side.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign integrated into the front panel, with visible text and tactile map or diagram
attribute_roof_design: flat horizontal light bar above the panel, no traditional roof structure
